summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Market Context Module (PHASE 3.5.4). All 10 API endpoints tested successfully with full Context Aggregator functionality working properly.
passed_tests: GET /api/market-context/health - returns status healthy and version phase_3.5.4
GET /api/market-context/stats - returns engine statistics with correct version
POST /api/market-context/analyze - full context analysis with all 5 engines working
GET /api/market-context/funding/{symbol} - funding context with state, pressure, overcrowding detection
GET /api/market-context/oi/{symbol} - OI context with state, squeeze_probability, participation quality
GET /api/market-context/volatility/{symbol} - volatility context with regime, percentile, risk_multiplier
GET /api/market-context/macro - macro context with regime, risk_environment, cross_market_alignment
GET /api/market-context/volume-profile/{symbol} - VP context with POC, VA, node proximity
POST /api/market-context/batch - batch analysis for multiple symbols
Context aggregator returns proper context_score, primary_bias, breakout_confidence_adj, trend_confidence_adj
All 5 context engines (funding, OI, volatility, macro, volume_profile) working correctly
Mock data generators producing realistic values within expected ranges
Proper enum validation for all state fields
Correct value range validation for scores and multipliers
